description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.5 Docker image with a before_script that runs `pip install -r requirements.txt`, and define two stages: build and test. In the build stage add check_week_4_additional (allow_failure, except master and branches@CSUI-AdvProg-2017/lab-exercises, only /^lab[-_].*4$/, script `test -e week_4/week4a.py`) and check_week_4_mandatory (except master and lab‑exercises, only /^lab[-_].*4$/, script `test -e week_4/week4.py`, `test -e week_4/test_week4.py`, `test -e week_4/m1facade.txt`) plus prep_week_3 (only /^week-3$/@CSUI-AdvProg-2017/lab-exercises, script `python -m flake8 --ignore=F821 week-3`), prep_week_4 (only /^week-4$/@..., script `python -m flake8 --ignore=F821 week_4`), prep_week_5 (only /^week-5$/@..., script `test -e week_5/README.md` and `python -m flake8 week_5`), prep_week_6 (only /^week-6$/@..., script `test -e week_6/README.md` and `python -m flake8 week_6`), prep_week_7 (only /^week-7$/@..., script `test -e week_7/README.md` and `python -m flake8 week_7`), and prep_week_8 (only /^week_8$/@..., script `test -e week_8/README.md`, `test -e week_8/MANDATORY.md`, `test -e week_8/ADDITIONAL.md`). In the test stage add grade_week_1_additional (allow_failure, only /^lab[-_].*1$/, script `file week_1/form_a1.py` and `python week_1/form_a1.py`), grade_week_1_mandatory (only /^lab[-_].*1$/, script `file week_1/form_m{1,2,3}.py` and `python week_1/form_m{1,2,3}.py`), grade_week_2_additional (only /^lab[-_].*2$/, script `cd week_2/factory-method-pattern`, `python Tutorial2-FM-Dynamic.py`, `cat factoryMethodPattern.txt`), grade_week_2_mandatory (only /^lab[-_].*2$/, script `cd week_2/factory-method-pattern`, `python Tutorial2-FM.py`, `cd ../singleton-pattern`, `python SingletonPattern.py`, `python NewSingleton.py`, `cat SingletonVsNewSingleton.txt`, `python Tutorial2Singleton.py`), grade_week_3_additional (only /^lab[-_].*3$/, script `file week_3/a1bridge.py` and `python week_3/a1bridge.py`), grade_week_3_mandatory (only /^lab[-_].*3$/, script `file week_3/m1{adapter,bridge}.py`, `file week_3/m2{adapter,bridge}.txt`, `python week_3/m1{adapter,bridge}.py`, `cat week_3/m2{adapter,bridge}.txt`), grade_week_4_additional (allow_failure, only /^lab[-_].*4$/, script `python week_4/week4a.py`), grade_week_4_mandatory (only /^lab[-_].*4$/, script `python week_4/week4.py`, `cat week_4/m1facade.txt`, `python -m unittest discover week_4`), grade_week_5_additional (allow_failure, only /^lab[-_].*5$/, script `cd week_5`, `python -m unittest tests/a1com-tests.py`, `python -m unittest tests/a1cor-tests.py`), grade_week_5_mandatory (only /^lab[-_].*5$/, script `cd week_5`, `python -m unittest tests/m1com-tests.py`, `python -m unittest tests/m1cor-tests.py`), grade_week_6_additional (allow_failure, only /^lab[-_].*6$/, script `python week_6/additional_observer.py`), grade_week_6_mandatory (only /^lab[-_].*6$/, script `python week_6/{simple_observer,mediator,observer}.py`), grade_week_7_additional (allow_failure, only /^lab[-_].*7$/, script `python week_7/queue_{a1,a2}.py`), and grade_week_7_mandatory (only /^lab[-_].*7$/, script `cat week_7/queue_{m1,m2}.txt`, `cat week_7/futures_m1.txt`, `python week_7/queue_{m1,m2}.py`, `python week_7/futures_m1.py`). All additional jobs allow failure while mandatory jobs do not, each excludes master and the lab‑exercises project via except rules, and no caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined.
